---
name: Flow usage question
about: Ask how the RNA-seq flows connect or how to prepare inputs
title: "[Question]: "
labels: question
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What biological or analysis question are you trying to answer?

## Current inputs

Describe your available data, for example FASTQ, genome FASTA, GTF/GFF3,
samples.tsv, metadata.tsv, GMT gene sets, or existing count matrices.

## Flow or route

Which flow or route are you considering?

## Question

What is unclear?

Please avoid posting private data. Small synthetic examples are best.
